failures.description: No failure occurred in the trajectory.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal matches the user request: find available black smartphones costing more than $1143.42. The tool call at index 3 returned two available black smartphones: item 1507389580 at $1157.86 and item 5339029584 at $1128.99. The agent correctly filtered out the cheaper item and returned only item 1507389580. No tool invocation error, invented information, misinterpretation, unsupported intent, guardrail, or system failure is present.
